Handle deployments of a .NET Aspire AppHost

Description:

Usage:
  aspirate [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init      Initializes aspirate settings within your AppHost directory.
  run       Builds, pushes containers, and runs the current solution directly against a kubernetes cluster.
  stop      Stops a deployment that has been made using 'aspirate run' by destroying it.
  generate  Builds, pushes containers, generates aspire manifest, helm chart and kustomize manifests.
  build     Builds and pushes containers
  apply     Apply the generated kustomize manifest to the cluster.
  destroy   Removes the manifests from your cluster..
  settings  Managed Aspir8 settings.

Handle deployments of a .NET Aspire AppHost

Description:
  Apply the generated kustomize manifest to the cluster.

Usage:
  aspirate apply [options]

Options:
  NonInteractive, --non-interactive                     Disables interactive mode for the command []
  DisableSecrets, --disable-secrets                     Disables Secret Support []
  DisableState, --disable-state, --no-state             Disables State Support []
  LaunchProfile, -lp, --launch-profile <LaunchProfile>  The launch profile to use when building the aspire manifest from the AppHost. []
  InputPath, -i, --input-path <InputPath>               The path for the kustomize manifests directory [default: aspirate-output]
  KubeContext, -k, --kube-context <KubeContext>         The name of the kubernetes context to use []
  SecretPassword, --secret-password <SecretPassword>    The Secret Password to use []
  RollingRestart, -r, --rolling-restart                 Indicates if a rolling restart should occur at the end of deploy. Defaults to 'false'. []
  -?, -h, --help                                        Show help and usage information

Handle deployments of a .NET Aspire AppHost

Description:
  Builds and pushes containers

Usage:
  aspirate build [options]

Options:
  NonInteractive, --non-interactive                                                           Disables interactive mode for the command []
  DisableSecrets, --disable-secrets                                                           Disables Secret Support []
  DisableState, --disable-state, --no-state                                                   Disables State Support []
  LaunchProfile, -lp, --launch-profile <LaunchProfile>                                        The launch profile to use when building the aspire manifest from the AppHost. []
  ProjectPath, -p, --project-path <ProjectPath>                                               The path to the aspire project [default: .]
  AspireManifest, -m, --aspire-manifest <AspireManifest>                                      The aspire manifest file to use []
  ContainerBuilder, --container-builder <ContainerBuilder>                                    The Container Builder: can be 'docker' or 'podman'. The default is 'docker' [default: docker]
  ContainerBuildContext, -cbc, --container-build-context <ContainerBuildContext>              The Container Build Context to use when Dockerfile is used to build projects []
  ContainerImageTags, -ct, --container-image-tag <ContainerImageTags>                         The Container Image Tags to use for all containers. Can include multiple times. []
  ContainerBuildArgs, -cba, --container-build-arg <ContainerBuildArgs>                        The Container Build Arguments to use for all containers. In "key"="value" format. Can include multiple times. []
  PreferDockerfile, --prefer-dockerfile                                                       Instructs to use Dockerfile when available to build project images []
  ContainerRegistry, -cr, --container-registry <ContainerRegistry>                            The Container Registry to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ContainerRepositoryPrefix, -crp, --container-repository-prefix <ContainerRepositoryPrefix>  The Container repository prefix to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  RuntimeIdentifier, --runtime-identifier <RuntimeIdentifier>                                 The Custom Runtime identifier to use for .net project builds. []
  -?, -h, --help                                                                              Show help and usage information

Handle deployments of a .NET Aspire AppHost

Description:
  Builds, pushes containers, generates aspire manifest, helm chart and kustomize manifests.

Usage:
  aspirate generate [options]

Options:
  NonInteractive, --non-interactive                                                           Disables interactive mode for the command []
  DisableSecrets, --disable-secrets                                                           Disables Secret Support []
  DisableState, --disable-state, --no-state                                                   Disables State Support []
  LaunchProfile, -lp, --launch-profile <LaunchProfile>                                        The launch profile to use when building the aspire manifest from the AppHost. []
  ProjectPath, -p, --project-path <ProjectPath>                                               The path to the aspire project [default: .]
  AspireManifest, -m, --aspire-manifest <AspireManifest>                                      The aspire manifest file to use []
  OutputPath, -o, --output-path <OutputPath>                                                  The output path for generated manifests [default: aspirate-output]
  SkipBuild, --skip-build                                                                     Skips build and Push of containers []
  SkipFinalKustomizeGeneration, -sf, --skip-final, --skip-final-kustomize-generation          Skips The final generation of the kustomize manifest, which is the parent top level file []
  ContainerBuilder, --container-builder <ContainerBuilder>                                    The Container Builder: can be 'docker' or 'podman'. The default is 'docker' [default: docker]
  ContainerBuildContext, -cbc, --container-build-context <ContainerBuildContext>              The Container Build Context to use when Dockerfile is used to build projects []
  ContainerImageTags, -ct, --container-image-tag <ContainerImageTags>                         The Container Image Tags to use for all containers. Can include multiple times. []
  ContainerBuildArgs, -cba, --container-build-arg <ContainerBuildArgs>                        The Container Build Arguments to use for all containers. In "key"="value" format. Can include multiple times. []
  PreferDockerfile, --prefer-dockerfile                                                       Instructs to use Dockerfile when available to build project images []
  ContainerRegistry, -cr, --container-registry <ContainerRegistry>                            The Container Registry to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ContainerRepositoryPrefix, -crp, --container-repository-prefix <ContainerRepositoryPrefix>  The Container repository prefix to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ImagePullPolicy, --image-pull-policy <ImagePullPolicy>                                      The Image pull policy to use when generating manifests []
  Namespace, --namespace <Namespace>                                                          The Namespace to use for deployments []
  OutputFormat, --output-format <OutputFormat>                                                The output format of the generated manifests. Supported values are 'kustomize', 'compose', and 'helm'. []
  RuntimeIdentifier, --runtime-identifier <RuntimeIdentifier>                                 The Custom Runtime identifier to use for .net project builds. []
  SecretPassword, --secret-password <SecretPassword>                                          The Secret Password to use []
  WithPrivateRegistry, --private-registry                                                     Enables Private registry imagePullSecret. You will need to supply username and password as well. []
  PrivateRegistryUrl, --private-registry-url <PrivateRegistryUrl>                             The Private Registry url. []
  PrivateRegistryUsername, --private-registry-username <PrivateRegistryUsername>              The Private Registry username. []
  PrivateRegistryPassword, --private-registry-password <PrivateRegistryPassword>              The Private Registry password. []
  PrivateRegistryEmail, --private-registry-email <PrivateRegistryEmail>                       The Private Registry email. It is required and defaults to 'aspirate@aspirate.com'. [default: aspir8@aka.ms]
  IncludeDashboard, --include-dashboard, --with-dashboard                                     Include the Aspire Dashboard in the generated manifests []
  ComposeBuilds, --compose-build <ComposeBuilds>                                              Specify the resource names which will be built by the compose file. []
  ReplaceSecrets, --replace-secrets                                                           Replace all secrets and inputs. []
  Parameters, -pa, --parameter <Parameters>                                                   The parameter resource value. []
  -?, -h, --help                                                                              Show help and usage information

Handle deployments of a .NET Aspire AppHost

Description:
  Initializes aspirate settings within your AppHost directory.

Usage:
  aspirate init [options]

Options:
  NonInteractive, --non-interactive                                                           Disables interactive mode for the command []
  DisableSecrets, --disable-secrets                                                           Disables Secret Support []
  DisableState, --disable-state, --no-state                                                   Disables State Support []
  LaunchProfile, -lp, --launch-profile <LaunchProfile>                                        The launch profile to use when building the aspire manifest from the AppHost. []
  ProjectPath, -p, --project-path <ProjectPath>                                               The path to the aspire project [default: .]
  ContainerBuilder, --container-builder <ContainerBuilder>                                    The Container Builder: can be 'docker' or 'podman'. The default is 'docker' [default: docker]
  ContainerBuildArgs, -cba, --container-build-arg <ContainerBuildArgs>                        The Container Build Arguments to use for all containers. In "key"="value" format. Can include multiple times. []
  ContainerBuildContext, -cbc, --container-build-context <ContainerBuildContext>              The Container Build Context to use when Dockerfile is used to build projects []
  ContainerRegistry, -cr, --container-registry <ContainerRegistry>                            The Container Registry to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ContainerRepositoryPrefix, -crp, --container-repository-prefix <ContainerRepositoryPrefix>  The Container repository prefix to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ContainerImageTags, -ct, --container-image-tag <ContainerImageTags>                         The Container Image Tags to use for all containers. Can include multiple times. []
  TemplatePath, -tp, --template-path <TemplatePath>                                           The Custom Template path to use []
  -?, -h, --help                                                                              Show help and usage information

Handle deployments of a .NET Aspire AppHost

Description:
  Builds, pushes containers, and runs the current solution directly against a kubernetes cluster.

Usage:
  aspirate run [options]

Options:
  NonInteractive, --non-interactive                                                           Disables interactive mode for the command []
  DisableSecrets, --disable-secrets                                                           Disables Secret Support []
  DisableState, --disable-state, --no-state                                                   Disables State Support []
  LaunchProfile, -lp, --launch-profile <LaunchProfile>                                        The launch profile to use when building the aspire manifest from the AppHost. []
  ProjectPath, -p, --project-path <ProjectPath>                                               The path to the aspire project [default: .]
  AspireManifest, -m, --aspire-manifest <AspireManifest>                                      The aspire manifest file to use []
  SkipBuild, --skip-build                                                                     Skips build and Push of containers []
  ContainerBuilder, --container-builder <ContainerBuilder>                                    The Container Builder: can be 'docker' or 'podman'. The default is 'docker' [default: docker]
  ContainerBuildContext, -cbc, --container-build-context <ContainerBuildContext>              The Container Build Context to use when Dockerfile is used to build projects []
  ContainerImageTags, -ct, --container-image-tag <ContainerImageTags>                         The Container Image Tags to use for all containers. Can include multiple times. []
  ContainerBuildArgs, -cba, --container-build-arg <ContainerBuildArgs>                        The Container Build Arguments to use for all containers. In "key"="value" format. Can include multiple times. []
  PreferDockerfile, --prefer-dockerfile                                                       Instructs to use Dockerfile when available to build project images []
  ContainerRegistry, -cr, --container-registry <ContainerRegistry>                            The Container Registry to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ContainerRepositoryPrefix, -crp, --container-repository-prefix <ContainerRepositoryPrefix>  The Container repository prefix to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ImagePullPolicy, --image-pull-policy <ImagePullPolicy>                                      The Image pull policy to use when generating manifests []
  Namespace, --namespace <Namespace>                                                          The Namespace to use for deployments []
  RuntimeIdentifier, --runtime-identifier <RuntimeIdentifier>                                 The Custom Runtime identifier to use for .net project builds. []
  SecretPassword, --secret-password <SecretPassword>                                          The Secret Password to use []
  WithPrivateRegistry, --private-registry                                                     Enables Private registry imagePullSecret. You will need to supply username and password as well. []
  PrivateRegistryUrl, --private-registry-url <PrivateRegistryUrl>                             The Private Registry url. []
  PrivateRegistryUsername, --private-registry-username <PrivateRegistryUsername>              The Private Registry username. []
  PrivateRegistryPassword, --private-registry-password <PrivateRegistryPassword>              The Private Registry password. []
  PrivateRegistryEmail, --private-registry-email <PrivateRegistryEmail>                       The Private Registry email. It is required and defaults to 'aspirate@aspirate.com'. [default: aspir8@aka.ms]
  IncludeDashboard, --include-dashboard, --with-dashboard                                     Include the Aspire Dashboard in the generated manifests []
  AllowClearNamespace, --clear-namespace                                                      Is Aspirate allowed to clear the namespace if it exists before deploying during the run command? []
  -?, -h, --help                                                                              Show help and usage information

  AspireManifest, -m, --aspire-manifest <AspireManifest>                                      The aspire manifest file to use []
  SkipBuild, --skip-build                                                                     Skips build and Push of containers []
  ContainerBuilder, --container-builder <ContainerBuilder>                                    The Container Builder: can be 'docker' or 'podman'. The default is 'docker' [default: docker]
  ContainerBuildContext, -cbc, --container-build-context <ContainerBuildContext>              The Container Build Context to use when Dockerfile is used to build projects []
  ContainerImageTags, -ct, --container-image-tag <ContainerImageTags>                         The Container Image Tags to use for all containers. Can include multiple times. []
  ContainerBuildArgs, -cba, --container-build-arg <ContainerBuildArgs>                        The Container Build Arguments to use for all containers. In "key"="value" format. Can include multiple times. []
  PreferDockerfile, --prefer-dockerfile                                                       Instructs to use Dockerfile when available to build project images []
  ContainerRegistry, -cr, --container-registry <ContainerRegistry>                            The Container Registry to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ContainerRepositoryPrefix, -crp, --container-repository-prefix <ContainerRepositoryPrefix>  The Container repository prefix to use as the fall-back value for all containers []
  ImagePullPolicy, --image-pull-policy <ImagePullPolicy>                                      The Image pull policy to use when generating manifests []
  Namespace, --namespace <Namespace>                                                          The Namespace to use for deployments []
  RuntimeIdentifier, --runtime-identifier <RuntimeIdentifier>                                 The Custom Runtime identifier to use for .net project builds. []
  SecretPassword, --secret-password <SecretPassword>                                          The Secret Password to use []
  WithPrivateRegistry, --private-registry                                                     Enables Private registry imagePullSecret. You will need to supply username and password as well. []
  PrivateRegistryUrl, --private-registry-url <PrivateRegistryUrl>                             The Private Registry url. []
  PrivateRegistryUsername, --private-registry-username <PrivateRegistryUsername>              The Private Registry username. []
  PrivateRegistryPassword, --private-registry-password <PrivateRegistryPassword>              The Private Registry password. []
  PrivateRegistryEmail, --private-registry-email <PrivateRegistryEmail>                       The Private Registry email. It is required and defaults to 'aspirate@aspirate.com'. [default: aspir8@aka.ms]
  IncludeDashboard, --include-dashboard, --with-dashboard                                     Include the Aspire Dashboard in the generated manifests []
  AllowClearNamespace, --clear-namespace                                                      Is Aspirate allowed to clear the namespace if it exists before deploying during the run command? []
  -?, -h, --help                                                                              Show help and usage information

Handle deployments of a .NET Aspire AppHost

Description:
  Stops a deployment that has been made using 'aspirate run' by destroying it.

Usage:
  aspirate stop [options]

Options:
  NonInteractive, --non-interactive                     Disables interactive mode for the command []
  DisableSecrets, --disable-secrets                     Disables Secret Support []
  DisableState, --disable-state, --no-state             Disables State Support []
  LaunchProfile, -lp, --launch-profile <LaunchProfile>  The launch profile to use when building the aspire manifest from the AppHost. []
  -?, -h, --help                                        Show help and usage information
